name: Barrier
description: Blocks movement for all units. Provides cover to adjacent friendly units, reducing incoming damage.

name: Fortified Wall
description: Heavy barrier. Blocks movement. Provides stronger cover bonus than a standard Barrier. Upgrade path from Barrier — Builder can upgrade an existing Barrier for the cost difference.

name: Relay Post
description: Amplifies the Extractor's output. Must be placed within 4 tiles of the Extractor to take effect. Multiple Relay Posts stack.

name: Watchtower
description: Passively removes fog of war in a radius. Units inside the watchtower's vision zone are always visible regardless of fog.

name: Turret
description: Automatically attacks the nearest visible enemy unit each turn. Low damage. Does not require an action to fire.

name: Sanctified Ground
description: Tiles adjacent to this structure apply a minor DoT to any enemy unit that enters them. Friendly units are unaffected.

name: Resonance Beacon
description: Amplifies all Cantor DoT effects within range. DoTs applied by Cantors within 5 tiles deal increased damage per tick.

name: Sensor Array
description: Reveals all enemy units within a large radius regardless of fog of war. Enemy units in range are Marked automatically.

name: Supply Cache
description: Generates a small amount of global currency each turn independently of the Extractor. Does not require resource tile proximity.

name: Spike Wall
description: Functions as a Barrier. Additionally, any unit that destroys this structure takes heavy damage from the spikes.

name: War Totem
description: Increases the attack stat of all Vrath units within range. The bonus applies passively while the totem stands.

name: Booby Trap
description: Invisible to enemy units. Detonates when an enemy unit enters the tile, dealing heavy damage. Destroyed on detonation.

name: Scrap Turret
description: Stronger than a standard Turret but unreliable. Has a 25% chance to malfunction and not fire each turn.
